items.title: Reproducible eval notebook
items.scenario: An evaluation notebook must produce the same numbers for any reviewer.
items.explanation: Ordered cells plus Restart & Run All guarantee the results don't depend on hidden state.

items.title: Graduating a prompt helper
items.scenario: A prompt-building function you prototyped is now used in three notebooks.
items.explanation: Move it into prompts.py and import it everywhere, so there's one tested source of truth.

items.title: Clean PR diffs
items.scenario: A notebook PR is unreadable because outputs (including a model response) changed.
items.explanation: nbstripout removes outputs before commit; jupytext pairs a .py for human-readable diffs.

items.title: Avoiding a leaked key
items.scenario: A shared notebook nearly committed an API key in a cell.
items.explanation: Reading the key from os.environ keeps it out of the saved, shared file.
